subject: Finding light after a breakup
body: I just went through a breakup and feel completely heartbroken. I can't sleep, and your songs are the only things that help me breathe.

subject: Tour dates?
body: I love the new album and can't wait to see you on tour. Any chance you'll add a second night in Austin?

subject: Cheated on and hurting
body: My partner cheated on me. I'm struggling with the betrayal and grief, and I don't know how to move forward.

subject: Ghosted and lonely
body: After being ghosted, I feel so lonely on weekends. Your lyrics keep me company.

subject: Divorce this week
body: My divorce becomes final this week. I'm trying to keep moving on, but some days it hurts so much.

subject: Merch question
body: Can you sign a poster for my sister at the show? She would be over the moon!

subject: Heartbroken after a breakup
body: I've been heartbroken for months after the breakup. I found out he was cheating and I don't know who I am anymore.

subject: Coping with grief
body: Thank you for your words. I'm dealing with grief after my dog passed, and your music is a soft place to land.
